content.text:
I mean -- yeah, okay. *[brief pause]* 

I've tried the breathing thing, it doesn't really work for me, like I do it and then I just... the list is still there, you know? The Thursday thing doesn't go away because I breathed. 

So can we just -- what do I actually cut? Like is there a framework for this? Because I feel like if I could just get the right system I could actually push through this month and then things would calm down. They always calm down eventually, right?
